name: BIG TOMS AT FT PIERRE SALE BARN

violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Small child helping in the kitchen using bare hands while wrapping burritos.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Thawing of pork in the steam table, half of the product was up to temp while other half was still frozen.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave, fridge, and reach-in cooler are in need of a more thorough cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving holding kitchen utensils need to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Kitchen utensils were being stored in the sink at the time of inspection.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. No soap by the hand sink.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. No disposable towels located near the handwash sink.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Unlabeled chemical spray bottle located above the 3 compartment sink.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Coating on wire racks inside 2 door cooler are flaking.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Interior of kitchen microwaves need cleaned more often. Old food debris found.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ceiling fan needs cleaned more frequently.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
